{{Infobox character
| name = Emperor (Elder Empire)
| aliases = The Emperor (The Elder Empire: Sea), The Emperor (The Elder Empire: Shadow), Emperor (The Elder Empire: Shadow), Aurelian Emperor, Emperor (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|levitate wagons, create doors in blank walls}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|, Awaken gravel, sense the memories and potential in objects, bind himself to the heart of a Great Elder, emits an aura of madness, uses an invested pillow to put people to sleep, invested with Intent, dissolving a teacup with his will}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|, bring inanimate objects to life}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, Read Elders}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Emperor}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|, [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Aurelian Emperor]], original Heartlander, father of every bloodline, father of the Empire}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|, father of all}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, [[Sadesthenes]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Aurelian Empire]], [[The Guild|the Guild]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, [[Guild of Magisters]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Ruler|ruler]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, son of a wine merchant}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Imperial Palace}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|, [[Aurelian Empire]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Identity:''' later revealed to be [[Sadesthenes]], the philosopher Sadesthenes, one of his identities.}}

''See also: [[Emperor (Elder Empire) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor was the long-standing ruler of the [[Aurelian Empire]], a figure who maintained stability and protected humanity from the [[Great Elders]] for nearly two millennia. He was characterized by an immense, Iron{{!}}iron will and a sense of detachment from his subjects, often appearing more like an Elder than a human. His longevity was achieved through the use of one of [[Nakothi]]'s hearts, allowing him to live far beyond a natural lifespan. To govern and defend the world, he utilized the [[Optasia]], a specialized throne and global receptor network designed to amplify his ability to [[Read]] and monitor [[Great Elder]] activity across the globe. While this device provided unparalleled security, it also made him vulnerable to corruption and the direct attention of the [[Elders]]. The Emperor's reign was defined by his efforts to standardize civilization and combat the influence of the [[Elders]]. He was supported by companions known as [[Regents]], who were intended to defend humanity when needed. Following his death—which some believe he allowed to happen to prevent the [[Elders]] from seizing total control through a single individual—The Empire{{!}}the Empire entered a period of chaos known as the [[Long Mourning]]. In the aftermath of his passing, various factions and [[Guilds]] struggled for control, eventually leading to the rise of an [[Imperial Steward]] and a shift toward new governing structures like the [[Aurelian Alliance]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor was a man who lived for nearly two millennia, serving as the light and life of The Empire{{!}}the Empire while performing many bad deeds during his reign. A powerful Reader who borrowed the strength of the [[Elders]], he utilized objects harboring his limitless [[Intent]] and even employed a parasite to achieve immortality. His abilities were immense, allowing him to create doors in blank walls or levitate heavy wagons, though he was so removed from humanity that he was likened to [[Elderspawn]]. Despite his perceived immortality, the Emperor died over five years ago when he failed to resist the awakening of the [[Dead Mother]]. He once resided in the [[Imperial]] Palace alongside Naberius Clayborn{{!}}Naberius, and his death has left the throne vacant, though holding the Heart may provide a claim to his position.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">19</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor has been dead for over five years.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor is deceased.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor is a Reader with overwhelming powers.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor can levitate wagons or create doors in blank walls.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor lived for almost two millennia.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor is a man who uses objects that harbor his limitless [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor used a parasite to achieve immortality.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor is believed to be resurrected or immortal.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor is a figure Naberius Clayborn{{!}}Naberius lived around in the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius Clayborn{{!}}Naberius has had long proximity to the Emperor.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The position of Emperor is currently vacant.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor is described as the light and life of The Empire{{!}}the Empire.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c15">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The future Emperor is expected to board the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor died because he could not resist the [[Dead Mother]] when she began to awaken.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor was a powerful man who borrowed the power of the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor has done many bad things in his time.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Holding the Heart can make a case for the Imperial Throne{{!}}Emperor’s throne.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor is described as being so removed from humanity that he might as well be [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Emperor ordered [[Alsa Grayweather]] to be kept in [[Guild]] custody.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|As the ruler of the [[Aurelian Empire]] and a Reader who has lived for over a millennium, the Emperor serves as the father of every bloodline and the symbol of imperial civilization. This ancient figure, who possesses living memories of the [[Great Elders]] and can [[Awaken]] gravel, has performed extraordinary feats such as dissolving objects with his will and [[binding]] himself to the heart of a [[Great Elder]]. Throughout various engagements, he acted as a mysterious client for the [[Guild]], compensated [[Ulrich Fletcher]], and authorized both alchemical treatments and [[Baldezar Kern]]'s entry into the field. During combat with [[Shera]], he relied on his ancient, invested blades and white armor, though he also demonstrated brutal strength by breaking [[Lucan]]'s legs. Ultimately, his death triggered a desire for anarchy throughout The Empire{{!}}the Empire.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">40</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor compensated [[Ulrich Fletcher]] for his lost business.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The client is the Emperor.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor signed the release for [[Baldezar Kern]] to take the field.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is the ruler of the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is a Reader.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is described as the original [[Heartlander]] and the father of every bloodline.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor has a scar running down his forehead to his nose.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor gave permission for the Alchemists{{!}}alchemists' treatments.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor can [[Awaken]] gravel.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor wears a silver chain around his neck.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is the mysterious client of the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has had sparring matches with the Emperor.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor requires [[Shera]]'s service.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The blades are intended for service to the Emperor.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor's death led to a desire for anarchy in The Empire{{!}}the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor tells [[Meia]] she has the strength of a [[Pilgrim]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is the father of The Empire{{!}}the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor has living memories of the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor killed [[Nakothi]] by driving a spear into her heart.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor can sense the memories and potential in objects.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor has lived for more than a thousand years.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is the symbol of [[Imperial]] stability and civilization.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor can bind himself to the heart of a [[Great Elder]] without going mad.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor tells horror stories about the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor has laid a hand on Shera's bronze knife{{!}}Shera's knife.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor prepared [[Shera]] to deal with [[Nakothi]]'s tricks.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor wears white armor.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is the Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}Aurelian Emperor.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}Aurelian Emperor's voice is packed with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor claimed he could remake and reforge them to give them rebirth.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor's personal chambers were torn to pieces and spattered with human and inhuman blood.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor of the [[Aurelian Empire]] emits an [[aura]] of madness.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor uses an invested pillow to put people to sleep.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor's swords are ancient and invested with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor broke [[Lucan]]'s legs by stomping on them.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor has performed feats like jumping from a hundred feet and dissolving a teacup with his will.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor relies on the power of his invested blades during combat with [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor believes the subject's disposition is unsuitable for a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor states the subject is empathetic, clear-headed, has a strong moral compass, and questions everything.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor put the former Watchman to sleep and left him there.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Regarded as the father of all, the Emperor is a figurehead with absolute power to indulge his whims despite having no official duties. While he makes many decisions for the [[Guilds]], he lacks concern for individual people and serves as an exception to the rule that [[Readers]] should not rule over the populace. To maintain his influence, he built a global network of statue relays and sends Navigators bearing the [[Imperial Seal]] to deliver personal instructions. Although he once used the [[Optasia]] to control amplification devices and project his [[Intent]], he eventually sealed the power away from himself. In recent events, [[Calder]] has been identified as the Emperor, a man destined for the throne who was previously spared from execution by the ruler.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">21</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The characters discuss the need for an Emperor.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor spared [[Calder]] from execution.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor used the [[Optasia]] to control amplification devices and use his [[Intent]] anywhere instantly.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor cannot grow living flesh at will.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is an Emperor who intends to sit on a throne.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor makes many decisions for the [[Guilds]] but does not care about people.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The original Emperor is considered the father of all.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor sends Navigators with personal instructions and the [[Imperial Seal]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor is the only one to have seen Ach'magut{{!}}Ach’magut directly.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is the Emperor.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is destined to be the Emperor one day.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor is an exception to the rule that [[Readers]] should not rule over the populace.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor is a figure of Authority{{!}}authority that people are encouraged to protect.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor built a network of relays consisting of statues that look like him all around the world.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor sealed the [[Optasia]] away from himself and allegedly employed watchers to ensure he never used it.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor specified the construction of the carriage [[Calder]] is riding in.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor has invested thousands of [[goldmarks]] into [[The Testament]]'s construction.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor's Authority{{!}}authority is invoked by the [[Imperial Steward]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor is issuing orders to search for suspicious vessels.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor is a figurehead with absolute power to indulge his whims.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Emperor has no official duties.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Having lived for almost two millennia after escaping the [[Great Elders]] as a slave, the Emperor—known by the title [[Your Imperial Highness]]—dedicated his life to serving The Empire{{!}}the Empire and the world. A master of [[Intent]] who could bring inanimate objects to life, he once sealed the [[Great Elder]] Ach'magut{{!}}Ach’magut in an ancient [[library]] and personally trained the [[Gardeners]]. Despite his immense power to halt [[Elders]] or drag massive creatures from the sea, he faced madness within the dead island and eventually found himself unable to use the [[Optasia]] or protect his people. As he grew weaker and faced the threat of Elder possession, he instructed [[Shera]] to execute him if he lost control. Ultimately, after being targeted by [[Lucan]]'s squad, the Emperor was murdered by [[Shera]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">43</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor was murdered.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor believes no sacrifice is too great to prevent the rise of the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] has fought the Emperor in the heart of the dead island.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has indicated his centuries-long life is coming to an end.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is a person who has explored the possibilities of [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is a character who has lived for almost two millennia.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor once sealed the [[Great Elder]] Ach'magut{{!}}Ach’magut in an ancient [[library]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's title is [[Your Imperial Highness]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is considered safe even if a hostile army were to appear on top of him.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is a target of [[Lucan]]'s squad.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is wearing layers of silk in every shade of blue.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor cannot use the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor can no longer protect his people.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor took a name for himself after escaping the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has the ability to bring inanimate objects to life.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has been training the [[Gardeners]] personally.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor once went insane in the belly of the dead island.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's goal is to serve The Empire{{!}}the Empire and the entire world.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's words carry such [[Intent]] that it is impossible to ignore.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has outlived everyone else in the history of The Empire{{!}}the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is under threat of Elder possession.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has the power to drag whomever they like.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor attempted to build particularly large or intricate Optasias in the past.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's rooms are seen rarely by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor wears a simple, single-layered white robe.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's real throne is a skeletal metal frame located behind a weapons rack in his rooms.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor instructs [[Shera]] to execute him if he is not in control of himself.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor was lounging in his cage-like throne.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor can use [[Intent]] to halt an Elder.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor was once a slave to the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has changed from what [[Ach'magut]] predicted.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor uses forceful [[Intent]] to destroy things.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor corrected Elder-related problems from his throne.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is praised by Yala the High Mason{{!}}Yala.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's eye sees all.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor can flex his [[Intent]] to cause sources of flame to flare to life.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor produced hazy bubbles in the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor once dragged a massive shark out of the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's Active Reading{{!}}active Reading would have torn [[Shera]] to pieces if he were at full power.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor was killed by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is a figure who would be unable to follow the group through the mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is weakening and requires more personal attention for tasks.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|There is a baby Emperor that needs to be finished.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Formerly known as the self-educated son of a wine merchant named [[Sadesthenes]], the Emperor lived for over two thousand years while protecting all from the [[Elders]]. He possessed an Iron{{!}}iron will forged in war and used his powers to influence [[Imperial relics]], even [[investing]] his armor and bed with [[Intent]] to preserve life and ensure peaceful sleep. Throughout his reign, he maintained a signature appearance involving a crown and a wide-brimmed hat, while asserting his status as the first Reader. To combat [[Nakothi]]'s corruption, he crafted a powerful personality echo within the [[Optasia]] by layering his memories and [[Intent]] into his belongings. After he gave up his life to avoid defeat against the [[Elders]], a massive crowd gathered in the Capital for his funeral. His legacy remains so profound that defying him is seen as an affront to humanity, and his painted images continue to protect spirits within the city.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">24</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor has powers that can be referenced by [[Imperial relics]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor protected everyone from the [[Elders]] and has lived for over two thousand years.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor had a desire for safe, peaceful sleep that invested his bed with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor's crown was once made of bronze.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor's trademark attire includes a wide-brimmed hat.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Regents]] trust in the power of the Emperor.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has felt the force of will projected by the Emperor.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor has a crown.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor has a ghost.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor invested the armor to protect and preserve the life of the wearer.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital swelled with people for the funeral of the Emperor.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor's images are painted on walls in the Capital to protect spirits.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Defying the Emperor is considered defying The Empire{{!}}the Empire, civilization, and humanity.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor has [[Read]] [[Elders]] before.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor claims to be the first Reader and asserts that the [[Guild of Magisters]] has no Authority{{!}}authority over his teachings.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor crafts a ghost by layering his memories into his belongings and molding his [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor possesses boundless resolve and an Iron{{!}}iron will forged in war.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor gave up his life rather than losing a battle to the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor left a clear, comprehensive [[Intent]] in the [[Optasia]] to create an echo of his personality.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor's personality echo was intended to bolster his will against [[Nakothi]]'s corruption.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor was once known by the name [[Sadesthenes]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor's persona as [[Sadesthenes]] was the self-educated son of a wine merchant.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor and [[Calder]] woke in the same body.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor's echo is a force to be reckoned with.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Once hailed as [[the Liberator]] by those he saved, the Emperor served as the moral compass for the [[Guild]] and held a position previously occupied by only one person. Throughout his long life, he carried a [[Great Elder]]’s heart for nearly two thousand years, borrowed power from [[Nakothi]], and mentored figures such as [[Loreli]]. Though he was a historical figure who had already decided the world's future ruler, he ultimately allowed himself to die half a year ago when [[Shera]] killed him with a knife-thrust and sawing motion for the Independent cause. His death left the world to make its own decisions, though his strong [[Intent]] remains capable of erasing the wills of ordinary people.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">30</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] killed the Emperor for the Independent cause.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor was once called Liberator by the people he saved.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor is currently injured with a possible cracked rib, minor cuts, bruises, and a broken foot.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor claims to be the Emperor now.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] is armed with weapons belonging to the Emperor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor has old clothes.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor of humanity was killed by a knife-thrust and sawing motion.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor was killed half a year ago.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor borrowed power from [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Aurelian]] Emperor’s Intent{{!}}Emperor's Intent is strong enough to erase the wills of ordinary men and women.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor was the moral compass for the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The real Emperor let himself die.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Architects]] would move up the Emperor's timeline in service to him.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor's death left the world to make its own decisions.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor has already made a decision regarding who rules the world.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor knows the [[Regents]] and the [[Guild Heads]] personally.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor can hide [[Intent]] from [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor wears armor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor's helmet was struck by [[Bastion]]'s blade.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor enhanced [[Shera]] and [[Lucan]] with personal attention.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala the High Mason{{!}}Yala was first contacted by the Emperor more than two years ago.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor is a historical figure.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] honed her talent under the Emperor’s tutelage.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor has carried a [[Great Elder]]’s heart for almost two thousand years.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The position of Emperor was previously held by only one person.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor is a figure [[Shera]] is used to being in the presence of.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor is potentially related to the strength of urges in [[Shera's shears]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor stated that before the [[Elders]], all men are allies.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor taught [[Shera]] precautionary tales about those who dealt with [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor told [[Shera]] she needed to be ruthless.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Nobody wants to be the Emperor?” Calder spat out.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“The future Emperor is boarding,” the Guard said simply.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Guild Head, we were ordered by the Emperor himself to keep her in Guild custody.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“The Emperor has given us permission to do everything we can,” they’d said.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“That’s not possible,” Lucan whispered. “He’s Awakening the gravel.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
